notes: Bison's main light confirm. Using 2LK will do the same damage, however the 2LK, 2LP link is trickier than chaining two 2LPs together, but it's a nice low confirm.
Slightly trickier than the 5LK confirm, because it requires fast mashing of 2LP and a quick 2LK afterwards for good spacing, but in turn does slightly more damage.
Requires a link from 2LP to 5MP, and it may not work on all crouchers, but it's a good combo to use on a standing opponent.
An easy low confirm into HK Scissor Kicks that accounts for crouchers, but does less damage.

Tricky link, a double 2MK is not easy, but outside of that it does great damage and stun. If you miss this link often, then try ending with LK Scissor Kicks just to make sure that if the second 2MK is blocked, the Scissor Kicks can make the string safe.

Also a weird link, and just a weird combo overall. Usually a good option to use if 2MK is hit meaty, so you have a larger frame window to land 5MP. Does even more damage and stun than the double 2MK confirm but does not work on some crouchers.
